title: Senior/ Sales Manager, Leisure (Hilton Singapore Orchard)
description:
Description


With thousands of hotels in over 100 countries and territories, Hilton offers countless opportunities to delight. From an open door to a welcoming smile and an exceptional experience, we offer the millions of travellers who stay with us every year a welcome they will never forget. In addition to our flagship brand, Hilton Hotels & Resorts, the family of brands includes Waldorf Astoria, LXR, Conrad, Canopy, Curio Collection, DoubleTree, Hilton Garden Inn, Hampton and many others.

If you appreciate the impact global travel can have on the world, you may be just the person we are looking for to work as a Hilton Team Member. Because it’s with Hilton where we never forget the reason we're here: to delight our guests, Team Members, and owners alike.


Position Statement


The Sales Manager - Leisure is responsible for driving revenue performance across all leisure segments, with a strong focus on OTA production, general leisure travel accounts, group leisure business, and cruise-related partnerships. This role requires a commercially driven sales professional who can balance digital distribution strategy with proactive account management and market development.


What will you be doing?


As the Senior/ Sales Manager - Leisure, you will be responsible to lead the function with integrity and credibility for the following areas:

OTA Performance & Optimization

  • Develop and execute a comprehensive OTA strategy to maximize visibility, conversion, and revenue.
  • Manage key OTA partnerships (Booking.com, Expedia, Agoda, etc.) and lead quarterly and annual business reviews.
  • Ensure rate parity, content quality, and inventory accuracy across all platforms.
  • Collaborate with Revenue Management on dynamic pricing, promotions, and tactical campaigns to capture leisure demand.
  • Analyse booking patterns, KPIs, and demand trends to identify opportunities for growth.
  • Drive merchandising, seasonal campaigns, and market-specific offers to improve channel share.

General Leisure Accounts (FIT & Wholesale)

  • Manage and grow a portfolio of travel agencies, tour operators, wholesalers, and FIT partners.
  • Build annual account plans to drive production and strengthen long-term partnerships.
  • Conduct regular sales calls, training sessions, and joint marketing initiatives.
  • Identify new partners, markets, and distribution opportunities to expand reach.

Group Leisure Business

  • Proactively target and secure group leisure business including tour groups, MICE-related leisure extensions, sports groups, affinity groups, and special interest travel.
  • Respond to group enquiries, prepare proposals, lead negotiations, and close business.
  • Work closely with Events and Revenue teams to ensure accurate inventory, pricing, and space allocations.
  • Maintain relationships with key leisure group agencies.
  • Monitor conversion rates and develop strategies to improve win ratios for group leisure segments.

Cruise Business Development

  • Drive production from cruise-related accounts including cruise lines, ground handlers, pre-/post-cruise operators, and global cruise wholesalers.
  • Develop strong relationships with cruise operations teams to position the hotel as a preferred pre/post-cruise partner.
  • Understand cruise schedules, deployment changes, and seasonal patterns to forecast demand.
  • Create cruise-specific packages, marketing collaborations, and tactical offers.
  • As required, attend cruise trade events and trade missions to expand the hotel’s footprint in the cruise segment.

Revenue Delivery & Reporting

  • Deliver revenue targets across OTA, FIT, wholesale, group leisure, and cruise business segments.
  • Monitor performance, produce monthly reports, and provide insights to the commercial leadership team.
  • Collaborate with Revenue, Marketing, and Operations to ensure a unified commercial approach.

Market Insights & Competitor Benchmarking

  • Stay ahead of trends in OTA distribution, global leisure travel, cruise markets, and group travel patterns.
  • Analyse the competitive landscape and adjust strategies to maintain market share.
  • Recommend new packages, promotions, and commercial opportunities based on data insights.

Collaboration & Internal Engagement

  • Partner with Marketing to enhance visibility and storytelling across leisure channels.
  • Work closely with Front Office, Reservations, and Operations to ensure seamless execution for leisure guests and groups.
  • Provide training and updates to internal teams on segment needs, booking trends, and account expectations.

What are we looking for?


A Senior/ Sales Manager - Leisure serving Hilton Brands is always working on behalf of our Guests and working with other Team Members. To successfully fill this role, you should maintain the attitude, behaviours, skills, and values that follow:

  • 3 to 5 years of experience in hotel sales, with strong exposure to OTA, leisure, or group leisure segments.
  • Proven success in managing OTA portals, travel trade partners, and group travel business.
  • Strong analytical capabilities and comfort with data-driven decision-making.
  • Excellent communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.
  • Familiarity with PMS, CRS, channel managers, and digital distribution tools is an advantage.
  • Ability to manage multiple segments and priorities in a fast-paced environment.
  • Commercially minded with a deep understanding of digital and leisure distribution.
  • Strong relationship builder and collaborator across both internal and external stakeholders.
  • Proactive, structured, and solutions-oriented.
  • Adept at spotting new revenue opportunities across diverse leisure segments.

What will it be like to work for Hilton?


Hilton is the leading global hospitality company, spanning the lodging sector from luxurious full-service hotels and resorts to extended-stay suites and mid-priced hotels. For nearly a century, Hilton has offered business and leisure travellers the finest in accommodations, service, amenities and value. Hilton is dedicated to continuing its tradition of providing exceptional guest experiences across its global brands. Our vision to fill the earth with the light and warmth of hospitality unites us as a team to create remarkable hospitality experiences around the world every day. And, our amazing Team Members are at the heart of it all!

postedCompany.description:
OUE Limited (SGX:LJ3) is a leading real estate and healthcare group, growing strategically to capitalise on growth trends across Asia. Incorporated in 1964 and listed in 1969, OUE has a proven track record of developing and managing prime real estate assets, with a portfolio spanning the commercial, hospitality, retail and residential sectors, including some of the most recognisable landmarks in Singapore’s urban landscape.


To meet growing regional healthcare needs, OUE expanded into the healthcare business in 2017 with a vision to build a regional healthcare ecosystem anchored on Singapore’s medical best practices.
postedCompany.name: OUE LIMITED
